title: mirabilis albida
intro: Mirabilis albida, also known as the white four o'clock flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Mirabilis albida include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, and exhibit antioxidant and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis albida can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
